title: GeneralNames
description: GeneralNames schema from Asset Graph API

directory_names.description: The parsed directoryName entries in the GeneralName.

dns_names.description: The parsed dNSName entries in the GeneralName.

edi_party_names.description: The parsed eDIPartyName entries in the GeneralName.

email_addresses.description: The parsed rfc822Name entries in the GeneralName.

ip_addresses.description: The parsed ipAddress entries in the GeneralName.

other_names.description: The parsed otherName entries in the GeneralName. An arbitrary binary value identified by an OID.

registered_ids.description: The parsed registeredID entries in the GeneralName. Stored in dotted-decimal format.

uniform_resource_identifiers.description: The parsed uniformResourceIdentifier entries in the GeneralName.
